title: Polymer Patch for Spanish Delight
description: A Polymer Patch mod for Spanish Delight, allowing it to work fully server side!
body:
# Polymer Patch for Spanish Delight Refabricated

This is a patch for [Spanish Delight Refabricated](https://modrinth.com/mod/spanish-delight-refabricated), making it work fully server side, with all of its functionality intact.

Spanish Delight Refabricated is required and not included within this mod.

This mod requires server resource pack, about which setup you can read here: https://polymer.pb4.eu/latest/user/resource-pack-hosting/

You can read more about **[Spanish Delight Refabricated on it's Modrinth page!](https://modrinth.com/mod/spanish-delight-refabricated)**
